task: Fix QA BDD walkthrough authentication and authenticated page state capture
changes: Shared Playwright walkthrough helper module for local assets, deterministic mocks, and sign-in fixtures
Signed-out sign-in and code-requested visual walkthrough states
Authenticated deterministic BDD capture for every registered page state
Walkthrough Cucumber feature is tagged out of default smoke and available through a dedicated walkthrough profile
Visual walkthrough local asset routing is opt-in with WALKTHROUGH_LOCAL_ASSETS=true
Participant-consent resolver errors with study context now render the load-error path
Registry coverage now uses Git-tracked HTML routes so ignored/generated pages cannot create CI-only 404s
Environment-gated QA BDD passwordless bypass for allowlisted email addresses
Participant consent same-origin API URL and missing-context fixes
Focused regression tests and Cucumber feature coverage
